name: Bad Memory: Evaluating Prompt Injection Risks from Memory in Agentic Systems

description: arXiv:2607.14611v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A growing class of agentic systems maintain persistent state across sessions through memory files, behavioral preferences, and knowledge bases. While this makes agents more useful and self-improving, it also creates a new attack surface for prompt injections in which malicious instructions can be embedded within persistent files and influence fu...
author: Soham Gadgil, David Alexander, Sai Sunku, Franziska Roesner
